name: Claim denied after machine crushed my leg at factory, now what?

mainEntity.name: Claim denied after machine crushed my leg at factory, now what?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal fast with lawyer; add medical/witness proof.
acceptedAnswer.description: Appeal within 20 days (Utah) or 60 (Idaho) with new evidence like medical opinions.[5] Common denials: missed deadlines or pre-existing issues.[2] Key factors: Hire attorney experienced in hearings; gather malfunction proof. Many denials overturned. File OSHA if employer hid defects.

description: Appeal fast with lawyer; add medical/witness proof.
